description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa with a clean, boxy silhouette and a uniform matte coral-pink upholstery. The sofa features two large, rectangular seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all of which are attached and appear to be of equal size, creating a symmetrical and minimalist look. The armrests are broad, straight, and extend to the same height as the backrest, giving the sofa a solid, geometric profile. The legs are short, dark, and only slightly visible, suggesting a low-profile design that keeps the sofa close to the ground. The upholstery is smooth and untextured, with no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching, emphasizing a contemporary aesthetic. This sofa would be suitable for urban environments such as public waiting areas, lobbies, or outdoor covered spaces.
description: A modern, boxy two-seater sofa in matte coral-pink with broad straight armrests and smooth, untextured upholstery. Features two large, attached seat and back cushions for a minimalist, contemporary look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick, straight armrest and the depth of the seat and backrest cushions.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the symmetrical arrangement of two seat and two back cushions, as well as the broad armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, highlighting the sofa's boxy profile and armrest thickness.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the continuous, flat backrest and the sofa's overall rectangular shape.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, attached seat cushions and two matching attached backrest cushions, all uniform in size and symmetrically arranged.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, straight armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy, rectangular profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, dark legs barely visible at the corners, likely block-style and recessed for a low-profile appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, medium-height backrest with two attached, rectangular cushions forming a continuous, unbroken line.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color, smooth matte upholstery with no visible pattern, texture, or decorative stitching.
